description: Additional nutritional macro data for fitness meal planning
notes: Items requiring manual input: arepa (varies by recipe), vegetables (varies by type/portion), local market cheese (needs specific brand/product)

items.name: Arepa (small, 1 unit)
items.notes: Values vary by recipe (cornmeal, cheese, butter). Adjust based on actual preparation.

items.name: Vegetables (mixed, large portion)
items.notes: Estimate for mixed salad vegetables (lettuce, tomatoes, cucumbers, peppers). Adjust based on actual mix.

items.name: Salad (large)
items.notes: Estimate for basic green salad without dressing.

items.name: Cheese (local market - placeholder)
items.notes: NEEDS MANUAL INPUT - Values vary by cheese type (cheddar, mozzarella, etc.). Add specific local product data here.
